# Audio Fixtures

Synthetic WAV fixtures generated by `scripts/generate-audio-fixtures.ts`. They
are checked into the repo so tests are hermetic — no recording required.

- `silence.wav` — 1 second of true silence, mono, 16 kHz, 16-bit PCM.
- `hello-world.wav` — 1 second of a 440 Hz sine (placeholder "hello world"
  payload for pipeline tests that don't care about the content, only that
  something non-silent is present).

To regenerate: `npx tsx scripts/generate-audio-fixtures.ts`.
